title: Unbounded Knapsack
description: Same as 0/1 Knapsack, but each item can be used unlimited times. Find maximum profit within the weight capacity.
key_concept: dp[w] = max profit with exactly capacity w. Each item can be reused, so iterate capacity left-to-right (vs right-to-left in 0/1 knapsack).
when_best: Coin change, rod cutting, item reuse allowed. Key difference from 0/1: inner loop goes forward not backward.

hints.L1: Same DP table as 0/1 but items can be reused. The only change: iterate capacity left-to-right instead of right-to-left.
hints.L2: dp=[0]*(W+1). For each item: for w from item.weight to W: dp[w]=max(dp[w], item.profit+dp[w-item.weight]). Left-to-right allows reusing the same item.
hints.L3: Why left-to-right works: when we compute dp[w], dp[w-weight] already reflects the current item being included → allows reuse.
